history.text: San Marino became independent from the Roman Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
San Marino became independent from the Papal States, marking a key step in modern statehood.
A constitution set out San Marino's basic framework of government.

worthSeeing.title: Three Towers:
worthSeeing.text: The UNESCO medieval towers of Guaita, Cesta and Montale crown Monte Titano.

worthSeeing.title: World's Oldest Republic:
worthSeeing.text: Founded in 301 AD, San Marino claims the world's oldest constitutional government.

worthSeeing.title: Panoramic Views:
worthSeeing.text: The old city overlooks the Adriatic coast, Apennines and even distant peaks on clear days.

planningQuestions.q: What is San Marino known for?
planningQuestions.a: Three Towers, World's Oldest Republic, Panoramic Views.
